title: A protocol for high molecular weight genomic DNA isolation from Drosophila embryos
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This is a quick and robust protocol for isolation of High Molecular Weight genomic DNA from  Drosophila  embryos. We have used DNA isolated using this protocol for fosmid genomic library production.
steps_raw: This is a quick and robust protocol for isolation of High Molecular Weight genomic DNA from  Drosophila  embryos. We have used DNA isolated using this protocol for fosmid genomic library production.
